title: I Do Not Care If We Go Down in History as Barbarians
original_title: Îmi este indiferent dacă în istorie vom intra ca barbari
overview: "I do not care if we go down in history as barbarians." These words, spoken in the Council of Ministers of the summer of 1941, started the ethnic cleansing on the Eastern Front. The film attempts to comment on this statement.
